description: Mock auto-evolution events. Real events will stream from consumer products via webhook.

events.title: Patient list query optimized
events.description: Auto-detected N+1 query on /api/patients. Replaced with single JOIN. P95 latency dropped from 420ms to 38ms.

events.title: Mobile task card overflow fixed
events.description: Long task titles were overflowing on 375px viewport. Added text-overflow: ellipsis and max-width constraint.

events.title: Unauthenticated /api/appointments endpoint patched
events.description: GET /api/appointments was missing auth middleware. Added requireAuth() guard. No data was exposed — endpoint returned empty array to unauthed callers.

events.title: Invoice PDF date format localized
events.description: Invoice PDFs were rendering dates in US format (MM/DD/YYYY) instead of Indian standard (DD/MM/YYYY). Fixed in pdf-generator.

events.title: Blog hero image aspect ratio corrected on Safari
events.description: Hero images were cropped incorrectly in Safari due to missing object-fit fallback. Added explicit CSS fix.

events.title: Image assets converted to AVIF
events.description: Profile photos and clinic logos converted from JPEG to AVIF. Bundle size down 40%. LCP improved from 3.1s to 1.4s.

events.title: Time-tracker double-submit race condition fixed
events.description: Rapid double-click on 'Stop' created duplicate time entries. Added debounce + optimistic lock in stopTimer mutation.
